description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ubuntu:cosmic Docker image and defines a single build stage with a job named build that runs only on the master branch. Set the variable GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY to recursive. In the before_script run "apt update -qq && apt upgrade -y -qq" then "apt install -y -qq --no-install-recommends cmake curl g++ lcov libboost-filesystem-dev libboost-log-dev libboost-program-options-dev libboost-python-dev libboost-regex-dev libboost-test-dev libssl-dev". In the script execute "make -j$(nproc) coverage". In the after_script run "pwd && whoami", "pushd build", "./kovri --help 1>&2>/dev/null || ./kovri-util --disable-console-log --help && ./kovri-tests", "lcov --directory . --capture --output-file coverage.info", "lcov --remove coverage.info \"/builds/kovri-project/kovri/deps/cryptopp/*\" \"/builds/kovri-project/kovri/deps/miniupnp/*\" \"/builds/kovri-project/kovri/deps/webrtc/*\" '/usr/*' --output-file coverage.info", "lcov --list coverage.info", and finally "bash <(curl -s https://codecov.io/bash) -Z". No caches or artifacts are defined.
